Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendants Veracity Security Inc., A California Corporation, And Signature Security Services, Inc., A California Corporation, Only.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Gabriel Levine, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ronald Barranti, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Veracity Security, Inc., a California corporation formerly named United Protection Services Inc., a California corporation, also doing business as Veracity Inc., a California corporation, or Signature Security Services, Inc., a California corporation.
Defaults were entered against defendants Veracity Security, Inc., a California corporation formerly named United Protection Services Inc., a California corporation, also doing business as Veracity Inc., a California corporation, and Signature Security Services, Inc., a California corporation on June 23, 2010 & June 30, 2010, respectively.
Notice of Automatic Bankruptcy Stay as to defendant Anders C. Noyes, an individual, was filed on 8/20/10.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ronald Barranti, and against Defaulted Defendants Veracity Security, Inc., a California corporation formerly named United Protection Services Inc., a California corporation, also doing business as Veracity Inc., a California corporation, and Signature Security Services, Inc., a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $254,050.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $11,592.54.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $2,023.35, for a total judgment in the amount of $267,666.17.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing Re; Pltfs Request For Clerks Judgment Against Veracity Security Inc And Signature Security Inc
